name: Broker Agency User Invitation

Permission model (7 new permissions, role mappings)

blocking_condition.description: Phase 1 must be certified with 14/14 automated test PASS and operator approval

included: Audit logging for all invitation actions
deferred_to_phase_3: MGA management override of broker users

cross_phase_contamination_prevention.phase_1_regression_plan: 25-scenario test includes explicit Phase 1 compatibility checks

functional: Role assignment works for all types
security: MGA users blocked from standalone broker invitations
